Domperidone is a hormone people take to induce [[lactation]]. Often [[trans women]] but sometimes cis women who are lactating late, or even cis men.


Its use in breastfeeding for children is in question, but its use for [[milk rituals]] is well known

[[Category:Medicine]]
[[Category:Assisted reproductive technology]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
